# Science Workbench machine index
start: AGENTS.md
navigation: docs/INDEX.md
architecture: docs/architecture/top-level-design.md
constitution: docs/architecture/constitution.md
experiment_schema: schemas/experiment.schema.json
project_schema: schemas/project.schema.json
campaign_schema: schemas/campaign.schema.json
handoff_schema: schemas/handoff.schema.json
run_schema: schemas/run.schema.json
registry: docs/_machine/experiments.json
cli: python -m science_repo.cli --help
validate: python -m science_repo.cli validate
